name: Informed Consent Form
description: Schema for the Informed Consent Form — ICH E6 / 21 CFR 50 compliant

elements.label: Investigational Drug Name
elements.description: INN or internal code for the investigational product

elements.label: Therapeutic Indication
elements.description: The disease or condition being studied

elements.label: Study Duration (weeks)
elements.description: Total study duration participant would be enrolled

elements.label: Primary Efficacy Endpoint
elements.description: The primary measure of efficacy — must match protocol

elements.label: Voluntary Participation Statement
elements.description: Statement affirming voluntary participation and right to withdraw

sections.title: Purpose of the Study
sections.prompt_template: Generate the purpose section of the informed consent form.

sections.title: Risks and Discomforts
sections.prompt_template: Generate the risks and discomforts section of the informed consent form.
